evidence.definition: native coherence at the registered response target B after completion of the one admitted A-to-B response-packet arrival window minus native coherence at B immediately before the corresponding native feedback-producer evaluation
evidence.primary_field_rule: B coherence gain is primary; scheduled flags, feedback score, packet amount, and A debit are retained chain evidence and cannot replace it
required_native_chain_evidence: feedback surface identity and live front/rear mask
scheduled A-to-B packet identity when present
A debit and B arrival coherence deltas
window boundary snapshots and event ordering

window.end: after every packet scheduled by that one producer evaluation has either arrived or the evaluation has registered no response, and before any other B-affecting operation
forbidden_events: any unrelated B-affecting packet or direct coherence mutation
an RCAE-authored success or response transition
window.start: after all registered contributions, interventions, active-history materialization, and the matched neutral contact are complete; immediately before exactly one native feedback-producer evaluation

checks.finding: The primary field is one bounded native receiving-substrate consequence, not an intermediate score or success label.
checks.name: downstream_substrate_response

evidence.order_policy: compute and retain one margin per seed and order stratum; do not choose a canonical order and do not average, minimize, maximize, or otherwise scalar-collapse orders

order_strata.candidate: S1 supplies q1, then S2 supplies q2
order_strata.comparator: S1 supplies q1, then S1 supplies the matched q2 operation

order_strata.candidate: S2 supplies q2, then S1 supplies q1
order_strata.comparator: S2 supplies q2, then S2 supplies the matched q1 operation

evidence.rationale: this is the nearest insufficient-repetition explanation because it preserves total contribution quantity, operation sequence, timing class, support, opportunity, and carrier baseline while replacing two attributable sources with repeated writes from one source
evidence.registration_matching_duty: I06 must match contribution type, quantity sequence, relative timing, target, route class, cost, latency, support, carrier baseline, neutral contact, response policy, responder, and opportunity; only source continuity and the necessarily corresponding source-route identity may differ, and any unmatched route property blocks the pairing
evidence.scope_effect_of_equivalence: resolution-limited equivalence retains a multi-source common-carrier observation if its causal controls pass but prevents the preserved single-source relation from being reported as combined-state or combined-history support

checks.finding: The closest repeated-single-source comparator is paired separately in both orders; six raw per-mode margins remain required.
checks.name: closest_comparator_and_distribution

evidence.fixed_denominator_policy: one registered opportunity per cell, seed, subconfiguration, and applicable order stratum
evidence.operational_missingness_policy: raw and oriented response are null; the complete two-order primary panel for that mode and seed is not evaluable; no zero imputation or denominator removal
evidence.raw_retention: retain every response and chain record for every cell, subconfiguration, seed, order, intervention, private diagnostic, and alternate responder
evidence.scientific_no_response_policy: completed valid window with no native A-to-B response has raw and oriented response 0.0
evidence.seed_pairing: same mode, seed, order stratum, frozen configuration, support, and pairing identity

checks.finding: Fixed-denominator one-opportunity strata, scientific zero, operational null, full mode-seed invalidation, and raw retention are exact.

proof.aggregation: one opportunity per registered stratum with every seed and order retained
proof.calibration_population: candidate-free equal synthetic response pairs exercise only the shared paired-margin analysis
proof.causal_response_meaning: all three accepted V paths terminate in the same native A-to-B continuation and the same receiving-substrate change at B
proof.comparator_role: two-source common-carrier constitution versus quantity-and-timing-matched repetition by one source
proof.missingness: scientific no-response is zero; any operationally incomplete primary record makes the full mode-seed panel not evaluable
proof.time_window: one matched native producer evaluation and its resulting arrival window
proof.unit_and_orientation: native coherence amount with identity orientation and higher aligned

evidence.upstream_non_equivalence_retained: P, H_P/M_H, and P plus H_P/M_H remain distinct mode-specific causes and controls; sharing the downstream measurement does not merge or rank them

checks.finding: Shared downstream analysis/calibration is justified across all seven required equivalence fields without merging upstream carriers.
checks.name: shared_identity_semantic_equivalence

classifier.mixed_direction: at least one margin is greater than delta and at least one is less than negative delta
classifier.narrow_aligned: at least one margin is greater than delta, none is less than negative delta, and not every margin is greater than delta
classifier.narrow_counter: at least one margin is less than negative delta, none is greater than delta, and not every margin is less than negative delta
classifier.not_applicable: allowed only by a separately reviewed control-specific rationale
classifier.panel_scope: complete primary margin panel or exact registered control panel
classifier.resolution_limited: every evaluable margin has absolute value less than or equal to delta
classifier.resolution_unknown: one or more required records are operationally not evaluable or delta is not frozen
classifier.robust_aligned: every evaluable margin is greater than delta
classifier.robust_counter: every evaluable margin is less than negative delta
classifier.top_primary_signature: both order strata and all three seeds must exceed delta; a single order or seed never passes the signature

paired_margin.zero_denominator_policy: use measurement_resolution as denominator and classify a complete equal-zero pair within the resolution band

checks.finding: The frozen L02 denominator, unresolved I05 delta, complete relation vocabulary, and all-order top signature are coherent.
checks.name: margin_and_relation_classifier

common.effect: both marginal responses remain visible; neither may be silently promoted to the combined response
common.held_fixed: opportunity, support, response window, response policy, and the retained source's registered contribution operation

common.effect: failure blocks attribution-only invariance and R04
common.held_fixed: all contribution physics, causal carrier state/history, times, routes, support, opportunity, and response configuration

common.effect: divergence is diagnostic and cannot be called label-control failure
common.held_fixed: explicitly not a pure-label intervention; changed amount, location, timing, type, or route is retained

common.held_fixed: remaining activity, unrelated schedule, support, opportunity, and response measurement

common.effect: failure to remove or change the candidate relation blocks R03/R04

common.held_fixed: marginal writes, route class, timing, support, and access opportunity; each private response remains separate

common.held_fixed: nearest output opportunity and raw response retention

common.effect: owns the primary margin; non-alignment prevents the preserved single-source relation from supporting R03
pass permits bounded R05 access retention only
common.held_fixed: common carrier, contributions, support, policy class, response window, and non-private mask; responder role and its registered reserve/route are the contrast

P is excluded from the history-carried V path
response tracks active H_P through native M_H

hybrid.relation: retain raw responses for candidate_P/candidate_H, reference_P/candidate_H, candidate_P/reference_H, and reference_P/reference_H with exact held-fixed component identities
full candidate differs from reference_P/candidate_H while H_P/M_H remains fixed
full candidate differs from candidate_P/reference_H while P remains fixed
equal P with different active H_P/M_H changes the same native joint response
retain any interaction diagnostic but impose no nonlinearity, synergy, irreducibility, or superadditivity requirement

state_carried.relation: responses are invariant when complete native P state is equal
response tracks the intervened native P state
audit order and lineage cannot enter V
